topNews.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and customer operations. By the end of 2025, half of companies used AI in at least t…
topNews.summary:
• What happened: AI is rapidly transitioning from experimentation to widespread implementation in various business functions.  
• Why it matters: Effective AI deployment requires a robust data fabric to ensure data accessibility and integration.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can enhance AI effectiveness by investing in data infrastructure solutions that support seamless data management.

topNews.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Google Cloud has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab for AI infrastructure.  
• Why it matters: This partnership enhances Google's AI capabilities and strengthens its position in the competitive cloud market.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can leverage advanced AI infrastructure for innovative solutions and improved operational efficiency.

funding.title: Anthropic investigates report of rogue access to hack-enabling Mythos AI
funding.rawTextSnippet: Anthropic investigates report of rogue access to hack-enabling Mythos AI

dailyBrief: In a significant shift, Anthropic may remove Claude Code from its Pro plan, raising questions about the future of its offerings and potential impacts on user retention. Meanwhile, experts emphasize that a robust data fabric is essential for AI to unlock substantial business value, highlighting the need for companies to invest in their data infrastructure. On a positive note, Google has announced a multi-billion-dollar deal to deepen its collaboration with the Thinking Machines Lab, signaling a strong commitment to advancing AI research. Additionally, the introduction of eighth-generation TPUs, designed for the agentic era, promises to enhance computational capabilities for AI applications. Lastly, recent kernel code removals, driven by security reports generated by large language models, underscore the growing intersection of AI and cybersecurity, which could reshape industry standards and practices.
